message:
test(facade,optimize): add optimized config smoke test and harden parameter optimizer

integration: Add optimized_config_can_drive_searcher_for_multiple_queries
test verifying TwoTierConfig::optimized() produces a working configuration
that can drive the full search pipeline across multiple diverse queries,
ensuring optimized parameter files don't silently break the searcher.

optimize_params: Fix k_fold_split to handle k<=1 by returning all queries
as both train and validation instead of panicking on division by zero.
Pad optimization history to requested generation count so convergence
logs always have uniform length for downstream analysis. Add mean_val
parameter to write_outputs and generate optimization_report.md with
summary statistics. Fix CrossValidationResult type formatting. Add tests
for single-fold split, cross-validation reproducibility (fixed seed
produces identical results), optimization report file generation, and
history padding to requested generation count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
